data.title: Soulection Radio Show #449 w/ Olea
data.content:
Joe Kay, [Olea](https://twitter.com/olea_5), The Music and You.

<!--more-->

Music is a gift of life, You could be anywhere in the world, but you're here with us Today.

Remain positive, focused, slow down and breath.
